creator: ripley@nostromo.in-berlin.de
text:
During a fresh install I chose custom distribution set and the
	installation crashed.  I installed the minimal set.  On the
	running system, /stand/sysinstall crashes when selecting
	configure->distributions.
	I'll put a core dump image on ftp://bigfoot.mind.de/pub/FreeBSD/

How-To-Repeat: 
	Run /stand/sysinstall (as root), select configure, select distributions
